description: 잼짱(gemjjang) 캐릭터 IPAdapter 패키지 — waiIllustrious + mesugaki LoRA + IPAdapter PLUS(vit-h, CLIP-vision) 6-ref 배치 평균. 애니 캐릭터 정체성 전이용. references 미지정 시 input/gemjjang/ 6장 사용.

prompt.prefix: masterpiece, best quality, amazing quality, very aesthetic, absurdres, high detail, gemjjang, 1girl, solo, blonde hair, twintails, long hair, gradient hair, red hair tips, purple hair tips, blue hair tips, blue eyes, hair bow, teal bow, x hair ornament, gemini spark ornament, blue-purple gradient ornament, white shirt, long sleeves, teal bowtie, black suspenders, navy pleated skirt, multicolored skirt trim, black pantyhose, mesugaki
prompt.description: 표정·포즈·구도·배경 등 가변 태그만 입력 (캐릭터 고정 태그는 prefix로 자동 주입)

negative_prompt.default: bad quality, worst quality, worst detail, sketch, censored, watermark, signature, extra fingers, mutated hands, bad anatomy, multiple views

ip_preset.description: IPAdapterUnifiedLoader 프리셋. PLUS / PLUS FACE 권장

ip_weight.description: IPAdapter 정체성 전이 강도. 0.6~0.9 탐색 권장
